title: Soothfast
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Soothfast''''' was a retrofitted [[Proficient-class light cruiser|''Proficient''-class light cruiser]] of the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet]] that served during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]] under the command of [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Skent Graff]].

Six months into [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]], ''Soothfast'' was patrolling the space near [[Durren]] in the [[Meridian sector/Legends|Meridian sector]] when a pair of biotic warships entered the system. ''Soothfast'' and its complement of starfighters [[Battle near Exodo II|engaged]] the [[yorik coral]] spawn ship that moved towards them. After minor loses to [[Gauntlet Squadron]], ''Soothfast'' was able to destroy the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] warship and scare off its counterpart, although the victory was merely a ploy to deliver [[Elan]] and [[Vergere]] into [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] hands.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial]]'' {{1st}}
